message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: Creates a CloudFront distribution and Route53 alias cutover, removes S3 website hosting, and enables bucket-level public access block settings while serving content from private S3.

blocked_reasons: Website migration requires strategy_inputs.aliases for the Route53 cutover hostnames.
Website migration requires strategy_inputs.route53_hosted_zone_id for Route53 alias updates.
Website migration requires strategy_inputs.acm_certificate_arn for the CloudFront viewer certificate.
Website migration requires explicit aliases, route53_hosted_zone_id, and a us-east-1 acm_certificate_arn before executable cutover can be planned.

rejected_profiles.detail: Website migration requires strategy_inputs.aliases for the Route53 cutover hostnames.

resolution.decision_rationale: Family resolver downgraded strategy 's3_migrate_website_cloudfront_private' to manual S3.2 preservation profile 's3_migrate_website_cloudfront_private_review_required'. Website migration requires strategy_inputs.aliases for the Route53 cutover hostnames. Website migration requires strategy_inputs.route53_hosted_zone_id for Route53 alias updates. Website migration requires strategy_inputs.acm_certificate_arn for the CloudFront viewer certificate. Blocking checks: Website migration requires explicit aliases, route53_hosted_zone_id, and a us-east-1 acm_certificate_arn before executable cutover can be planned..
